---
name: research
description: Use when starting new feature work or investigating a problem before planning
---

# Research — Interrogate, Scope, Define

The starting point for any new work. Before building, interrogate the problem.

## Process

Use the read_file tool to read the current codebase context.
Use the run_shell_command tool to run discovery commands.
Use the grep_search tool to search for patterns.

## Transition

After completing research outputs, activate the `samsara-planning` skill skill.
